name: development/generate/audit
description: Audit all commands for generator conformance. Scans every command directory and checks for: matching generator spec, static accessor (Name.execute pattern), factory functions, any casts in Types files. Reports conformance status and summary statistics.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to specific issue type. Omit for all commands.

results.name: totalCommands
results.description: Total number of command directories found

results.name: withSpecs
results.description: Commands that have matching generator specs

results.name: missingAccessors
results.description: Commands missing the Name.execute() static accessor pattern

results.name: totalAnyCasts
results.description: Total 'any' casts found across all command Types files

results.name: orphanedSpecs
results.description: Spec files with no matching command directory

results.name: entries
results.type: Array<{ commandName: string; hasSpec: boolean; hasStaticAccessor: boolean; hasFactoryFunctions: boolean; anyCastCount: number; issues: string[] }>
